recommendations.title: Beats
recommendations.overview: An agoraphobic hip-hop prodigy and a disgraced former music manager cross paths in Chicago’s South Side and help each other face demons of their pasts.

recommendations.title: Let's Dance
recommendations.overview: After his crew breaks up, a gifted but insecure hip-hop dancer teaches at a top ballet school in Paris, where he falls for an aspiring ballerina.

recommendations.title: Tupac: Resurrection
recommendations.overview: Home movies, photographs, and recited poetry illustrate the life of Tupac Shakur, one of the most beloved, revolutionary, and volatile hip-hop MCs of all time.

recommendations.title: Heartbeats
recommendations.overview: When a bubbly American hip hop dancer goes to India with her family for a wedding, she is impressed by a new dance style and falls in love with the man who introduced her to it.

recommendations.title: High Strung
recommendations.overview: When a hip hop violinist busking in the New York subway encounters a classical dancer on scholarship at the Manhattan Conservatory of the Arts, sparks fly. With the help of a hip hop dance crew they must find a common ground while preparing for a com

recommendations.title: Hustle & Flow
recommendations.overview: With help from his friends, a Memphis pimp in a mid-life crisis attempts to become a successful hip-hop emcee.

recommendations.title: Kneecap
recommendations.overview: When fate brings Belfast teacher JJ into the orbit of self-confessed "low life scum" Naoise and Liam Óg, the needle drops on a hip-hop act like no other. Rapping in their native Irish, they lead a movement to save their mother tongue.

recommendations.title: Fabrizio De André: Principe libero
recommendations.overview: A biopic on the personal and artistic life of Italian songwriter Fabrizio De André.

recommendations.title: Mia Martini - I Am Mia
recommendations.overview: The movie is a biopic about Mia Martini, an italian singer who died in 1995.

recommendations.title: Biggie: I Got a Story to Tell
recommendations.overview: Christopher Wallace, AKA The Notorious B.I.G., remains one of Hip-Hop’s icons, renowned for his distinctive flow and autobiographical lyrics. This documentary celebrates his life via rare behind-the-scenes footage and the testimonies of his closest f
